case_title: EXPRESS QUALITY PRINTING, INC. vs. CONSUMER DIRECT ACCESS et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXPRESS QUALITY PRINTING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CONSUMER DIRECT ACCESS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-27-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-30-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-07-1995
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-27-1995, CONTINUED TO SEP-06-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DISMISSAL. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-06-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-06-1995, OSC FOR BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT TO APPEAR AND INFORM THE COURT OF WHY A DISMISSAL WAS NOT FILED. HEARING SET FOR OCT-06-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
CORRESPONDENCE RE: BANKRUPTCY & REQUEST TO CONT. STAT. CONF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF EXPRESS QUALITY PRINTING, INC.
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-06-1995, CONTINUED TO MAR-13-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFENDANT OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-13-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A STATUS REPORT OF THE DEFT'S BANKRUPTCY CASE. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL MUST APPEAR ON APRIL 12, 1996 OR FILE A DECLARATION DETAILING THE CURRENT STATUS OF DEFT'S BANKRUPTCY CASE. HEARING SET FOR APR-12-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM PLTF. RE: DISMISSING CASE: COPY OF DISMISSAL ENCLOSED WITH CORRESPONDENCE WAS NOT AN ORIGINAL. CASE REMAINS ON CALENDAR UNLESS ORIGINAL DISMISSAL IS FILED AND ENTERED.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
SERVICE FEE IRONMOUNTAIN FILED BY DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
